name: empty_seq_commutativity
reason: tests the empty sequence base case — if the base case is mishandled, empty sequences could produce unequal results

name: map_filter_len_leq_original
reason: filtered-then-mapped result should never exceed original length — if filter/map interaction is broken, length could exceed the original

name: filter_all_true_preserves_map
reason: always-true filter should be identity on both sides — tests that trivial predicates don't break the commutativity

name: filter_all_false_both_empty
reason: always-false filter should produce empty on both sides — tests that the commutativity result is vacuously correct for trivially empty filters
